nodes.name: Roast Chicken Dinner — Maple-Kissed Bowl
nodes.description: name: Roast Chicken Dinner — Maple-Kissed Bowl | short_description: Roast chicken thighs with quinoa, broccoli, and carrots for a protein-forward, fiber-rich veggie bowl. | meal_suggestion: Serve warm
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Roast Chicken Dinner — Maple-Kissed Bowl - name: Roast Chicken Dinner — Maple-Kissed Bowl | short_description: Roast chicken thighs with quinoa, broccoli, and carrots for a protein-forward, fiber-rich veggie bowl. | meal_suggestion: Serve warm: roasted chicken thighs with fluffy quinoa and steamed broccoli and carrots; the name suggests a maple-kissed flavor—top with a light maple glaze if you like. | nutrition_note: Protein-rich chicken thighs provide satiety; quinoa offers complete protein and fiber; broccoli and carrots add vitamins A and C plus fiber, making this a balanced bowl with moderate fat from the thighs.

nodes.name: Vegetable Soup & Bread — Garden Veg Bowl
nodes.description: name: Vegetable Soup & Bread — Garden Veg Bowl | short_description: A fiber-forward garden veggie meal featuring vegetable soup, whole-grain bread, and a fresh side salad. | meal_suggestion: Great as
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Vegetable Soup & Bread — Garden Veg Bowl - name: Vegetable Soup & Bread — Garden Veg Bowl | short_description: A fiber-forward garden veggie meal featuring vegetable soup, whole-grain bread, and a fresh side salad. | meal_suggestion: Great as a light, balanced lunch or dinner. For extra protein, add beans, lentils, or hummus to the soup or salad; drizzle a little olive oil on the salad for healthy fats; choose low-sodium soup to manage salt intake. | nutrition_note: Fiber-rich, plant-based meal with vegetables, whole grains, and a side of greens. Provides complex carbs from whole-grain bread and essential vitamins; protein is modest—consider adding a protein source if you need more satiety. Watch sodium levels in soup; opt for low-sodium options when possible.

nodes.name: Sheet-Pan Pork Dinner — Sesame Skillet
nodes.description: name: Sheet-Pan Pork Dinner — Sesame Skillet | short_description: One-pan pork tenderloin with potatoes and green beans roasted in olive oil. | meal_suggestion: Serve as a complete dinner: pair with a
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Sheet-Pan Pork Dinner — Sesame Skillet - name: Sheet-Pan Pork Dinner — Sesame Skillet | short_description: One-pan pork tenderloin with potatoes and green beans roasted in olive oil. | meal_suggestion: Serve as a complete dinner: pair with a side salad or steamed greens and a grain (e.g., quinoa) for extra fiber. Season with herbs and a light seasoning of salt if desired. | nutrition_note: Lean pork tenderloin provides high-quality protein; potatoes supply complex carbohydrates; green beans add fiber and micronutrients; olive oil contributes heart-healthy fats. This one-pan meal can fit into a balanced diet when portions are appropriate.
